User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account within the TalentOS system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity, matching Firebase Auth UID.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for login.

role.description: The role assigned to the user, determining their access permissions.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

accountStatus.description: The current status of the user's account.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Job entity.

title.description: The title of the job opening (e.g., 'Software Engineer').

department.description: The department to which the job belongs (e.g., 'Engineering', 'Marketing').

location.description: The primary work location for the job (e.g., 'New York', 'Remote').

status.description: The current hiring status of the job (e.g., 'open', 'closed').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job opening was created.

Candidate.title: Candidate
Candidate.description: Represents a candidate who has applied for a job.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Candidate entity.

jobId.description: Reference to the Job this candidate applied for.

name.description: The full name of the candidate.

email.description: The email address of the candidate.

resumeUrl.description: URL to the candidate's resume stored in Firebase Storage.

status.description: The current stage of the candidate in the hiring pipeline (e.g., 'Applied', 'Screened').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the candidate's profile was created.

Application.title: Application
Application.description: Represents a specific application made by a candidate for a job.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Application entity.

candidateId.description: Reference to the Candidate associated with this application.

jobId.description: Reference to the Job this application is for.

status.description: The current status of the application.

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: Records significant actions performed within the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AuditLog entry.

actorId.description: Reference to the User who performed the action.
